summary: This SEO strategy targets the growing search interest around AI's impact on software engineering careers. It balances high-volume awareness keywords ('will AI replace software engineers') with high-intent, career-focused terms ('AI skills for developers'). Content clusters should educate, reassure, and empower engineers through practical AI adoption guidance, tool comparisons, and future-proofing strategies. Featured snippet opportunities focus on definitions, statistics, and step-by-step career guidance, while internal linking connects awareness content to actionable skill-building resources—positioning the brand as an authority on AI's evolving role in software development.
